name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behavior

labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant logs here.

```
[paste logs here]
```

## Environment

| Key                  | Value           |
| -------------------- | --------------- |
| OS                   | e.g. macOS 14   |
| Browser              | e.g. Chrome 122 |
| Node.js              | e.g. v20.11.0   |
| npm                  | e.g. 10.2.4     |
| App version / branch | e.g. main       |

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
